items.name_cn:
Model 26905 White Small Suede
​【EXPRESS Small Handbag】 M26039 Black M26360 Grey M26905 Ivory White
This Express Small Handbag is a city masterpiece, inspired by the brand's classic Keepall travel bag. Crafted from fine calfskin, it features Monogram classic pattern trim and lining, metal hardware, and the iconic key pouch and padlock, showcasing the essence of Louis Vuitton's travel tradition. The compact size fits daily essentials perfectly, with multiple carrying styles to suit modern urban life.
Dimensions: 17 x 13.5 x 26 cm
(H x W x L)

M26359 Dark Brown M26358 Beige M26397 Ebony

(H x W x D)

items.name_cn:
Model N00198 Denim Blue
This Nevereverfull tote bag presents a distinctive check pattern in Damier Denim 3D cotton canvas, showcasing a chic look with polished metal hardware and leather trim. A zip closure provides ample space, working together with a detachable cotton denim canvas pocket to secure your belongings. Dimensions: 60 x 38 x 23 cm (L x H x W)
- Damier Denim 3D cotton canvas
- Calfskin trim
- Fabric lining
- Hardware
- Double zip closure
- Padlock
- Detachable nameplate
- Interior zip pocket
- Detachable pocket made of cotton denim canvas
- Handles: Double handles
- Made in France, Spain, Italy or the USA

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M47031 Recalls the classic Cite bag design from the 1980s, defining this HangOn bag with a rich retro vibe. Monogram canvas and WN trim shape a modern bowling bag silhouette, while the lock and nameplate add a brand signature. Zipper closure and adjustable shoulder strap offer flexible carrying. Dimensions: 26 × 11.5 × 6.5 cm

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather M25497 This Capucines mini bag shines in the 2025 Early Autumn collection with the Bloomcut pattern. Laser-cut calfskin features delicate cutouts, subtly referencing the brand's classic Monogram flower. LV lettering and top handle add rich details; suitable for crossbody, shoulder, or hand carry. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
